questions.q: Which province's immigration minister, Malaya Marcelino, was recently rebuffed by Ottawa in her push for higher provincial nominee allocations?
questions.correctText: Manitoba's Immigration Minister Malaya Marcelino traveled to Ottawa to request an increase in immigration numbers, but the request was denied by Mark Carney's government.

questions.q: The Ontario government recently faced criticism after purchasing a used $28.9-million private jet, a Bombardier Challenger 650, for which premier?
questions.correctText: Doug Ford's government purchased the $28.9-million used private jet to provide him with more flexible and secure travel.

questions.q: The federal government announced that eligible Canadians will receive a one-time top-up payment on June 5, 2026, aimed at helping with the cost of what?
questions.correctText: The federal government is implementing a one-time Canada Groceries and Essentials Benefit to help offset persistent grocery price increases.

questions.q: A truck driver who caused a fatal pileup near Montreal in 2022 pleaded guilty after admitting he was doing what at the time of the crash?
options: Playing a game on his cellphone
Watching a movie on a tablet
Reaching for a dropped water bottle
questions.correctText: Baljeet Singh pleaded guilty to dangerous driving causing death, admitting he was playing an online cellphone game (Ludo) instead of looking at the road.

questions.q: Prime Minister Mark Carney recently announced an upcoming global summit in Toronto where his government aims to secure how much in investments over the next five years?
questions.correctText: The Prime Minister's Office announced the Canada Investment Summit in Toronto with the goal of unleashing $1 trillion in investment over five years.
